rag_rules: Place AGREE contracts in component type scopes for port-level assumptions and guarantees, and in implementation scopes for subcomponent bindings.
Use annex agree {** ... **}; blocks for AGREE contract content.
generic_rules: Component type contracts should reference visible ports and features, not implementation-only subcomponents.
Ensure AGREE expressions use visible identifiers and proper types.
Place range assumptions and guarantees in type scopes when concrete bounds are provided.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: AGREE syntax uses assume/guarantee declarations, equation definitions, and assignment statements within annex agree blocks.
Use eq for equation declarations and assign for implementation-level bindings.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports in component type annexes.
Do not encode AADL properties as AGREE variables unless explicit typed ports or constants are available.
